Coming Events

August 1994
Journalism & Newsroom

A listing of upcoming journalism and computer-assisted reporting conferences scheduled for August and October 1994, including a NICAR seminar in Columbia, Missouri and a CAR Trek conference in Silicon Valley, California.

Coming Events

August 14-19, 1994 NICAR Seminar Columbia, Missouri

October 6-9, 1994 CAR Trek Conference Silicon Valley, California
